title: Workflow execution fails due to payload size limit
symptom: When executing a workflow with large image binary data, n8n returns a 'Request failed with status code 413' error.
not_this_if: Error does not involve large payloads
root_cause: The error occurs because the payload size exceeds the maximum limit set for the n8n instance. By default, this limit may not accommodate large binary data, leading to the 413 status code.
fix_steps: Add the environment variable N8N_PAYLOAD_SIZE_MAX to your Docker Compose or .env file.
Set the value to a higher limit, such as 268435456 for 256MB.
Restart the n8n service to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Increase the payload size limit in your n8n configuration.
